news.heading: Pre-appointment hearing: Government’s preferred candidate for Armed Forces Commissioner, Polly Miller-Perkins
news.teaser: The Defence Committee will hold a pre-appointment hearing for the Government’s preferred candidate – Polly Miller-Perkins – for the position of Armed Forces Commissioner.

news.heading: PM responds to IDC Chair on reversing aid cuts
news.teaser: The Prime Minster has told the Chair of the International Development Committee that increasing aid spending will be a priority “when resources permit”.

news.heading: Business and Trade Committee Chair responds to Ming Yang investment block
news.teaser: Rt Hon Liam Byrne MP, Chair of the Business and Trade Committee responds to reports that the Government has decided to block Chinese company Ming Yang’s plans to build a factory in Scotland on national security grounds.
